titleStmt.title: SII 23.95: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 95. (A.R. No. 95 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine

summary.p: This is an incomplete inscription which does not refer itself to the reign of any king. It seems to state that on a representation made by the Śrīrudras and Śrīmāhēśvaras from the eighteen vishayas (districts), assembled in the court-yard (tirukkāvaṇam) of the Tirujñānasambandan (-maṭha?) at Tirumāḍavaṉūr in Aṇḍa-nāḍu a division of Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam, the Śrīrudras and Śrīmāhēśvaras living in the Tirumaḍaiviḷāgam (surrounding streets) of the two temples of the Nālāyira Īśvaramuḍaiyār and Nilaiyuḍai-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār at Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi agreed to give the former the privilege of having an institution of their own known as Tirujñānasambandantaḷam in the Kulaśēkaran-tirumaḍaivilāgam street in their village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . samastajagadutpatti sṛṣṭisthiti samhāṇakāraṇam śrīmat śrīmāheśvara syedam sāśanam śāśvatam varam . śrīvāṇḍimaṇḍalattu Aṇḍa nāṭṭut tirumāṭavaṉūr tiruñāṉacampantan tirukkāvaṇattu tiru vuṭai ṭṭi niraintu kūṭṭattu patiṉeṇviṣayattu śrīrudra śrīmāheśvarom Ādeśam . teṟkil kūṟṟil muḷḷināṭṭu kallaṭaik kuṟicci nālāyira Iīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārum nilaiyuṭaiya pāṇḍiśvara muṭaiya na
yiṉār tirumaṭai viḷākam kulaicekaraṉ tirumaṭai viḷākattu śrīrudra śrīmā heśvaraṟkku Ivvūr tiruñāṉacampantaṉ taḷameṉṟu ttantiṭa veṇumeṉṟu tirāviṉaitiṟttāṉ coṉṉamaiyil Ivar collukai ṟkaṭavatākavum ccaturaiyyolaiyāvutākavum koṉṟatu kulaiyāvatākavu maṭuppatu tiṅkātaṉamāvutākavum Ittaḷattiruntu Eḻuti paṇiccukkuṭuppaṉa kuṭuppārākavum Ittaḷattu śrīrudra śrīmāheśvarar puṟappaṭṭuStops with this.
Digital edition of SII 23.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
